name: test_copy_message_to_clipboard
description:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

        Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
        the copied content matches the actual message text.
descriptionHtml:
TC-CHAT-008: Copy message to clipboard.

    Sends a message first, then verifies the copy button works and
    the copied content matches the actual message text.
statusMessage:
AssertionError: Clipboard content does not match message text (after markdown normalization).
  Clipboard (normalized): I'm ready to help you with copying a message! However, I don't see any message content in your reque...
  Expected: I'm ready to help you with copying a message! However, I don't see any message content in your reque...
assert "I'm ready to help you with copying a message! However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.\n\nCould you please provide:\n1. The message or text you'd like me to help you copy\n2. What you'd like to do with it (copy to a file, format it, extract specific parts, etc.)\n\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly." == "I'm ready to help you with copying a message! However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.\nCould you please provide:\nThe message or text you'd like me to help you copy\nWhat you'd like to do with it (copy to a file, format it, extract specific parts, etc.)\nOnce you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly."
  
    I'm ready to help you with copying a message! However, I don't see any message content in your request yet.
  + 
    Could you please provide:
  - The message or text you'd like me to help you copy
  + 1. The message or text you'd like me to help you copy
  ? +++
  - What you'd like to do with it (copy to a file, format it, extract specific parts, etc.)
  + 2. What you'd like to do with it (copy to a file, format it, extract specific parts, etc.)
  ? +++
  + 
    Once you share the message, I'll assist you accordingly.
statusTrace:
tests/ui/chat/test_chat_interface.py:220: in test_copy_message_to_clipboard
    assert _strip_markdown(clipboard_text) == ai_response_text.strip(), (
